findings.criterion: Labels/copy self-explanatory / navigation user always knows where they are
findings.description: Two visually similar '*' affordances appear near 'Potential savings' — a small superscript dot on the POTENTIAL SAVINGS stat tile, and the actual clickable '* How "potential savings" is calculated...' details summary further down. Only the latter is interactive.
findings.expected: A single, consistently-styled entry point for the methodology disclosure, or the stat-tile asterisk should also be clickable / visually distinguished as non-interactive.
findings.actual: The stat-tile asterisk is not clickable; a skeptical user may click it first and get no response before finding the real summary link below.
findings.suggested_fix: Either make the stat-tile asterisk also scroll to / open the details element, or restyle it (e.g. remove the dot, use a footnote-style superscript without underline) so it doesn't imply interactivity.

findings.description: Cache-write price line reads 'in×1.25 for 5-min cache, ×2.0 for 1-hour' — the second multiplier omits the 'in' term, breaking the parallel structure and inviting a misread (e.g. reading ×2.0 as relative to the 5-min price rather than to input price).
findings.expected: Parallel phrasing, e.g. 'in×1.25 (5-min cache) / in×2.0 (1-hour cache)'.
findings.suggested_fix: Repeat the 'in×' prefix on the second multiplier for symmetry.

verification.formula_text: cost = input×in + cache_write_5m×in×1.25 + cache_write_1h×in×2.0 + cache_read×in×0.10 + output×out
verification.current_prices_dated_and_versioned: verified against OpenRouter 2026-07-01, matching Claude Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5
verification.fable_tier_note: No fable usage in this session, so no fable row rendered — consistent with documented conditional behavior
verification.caveat_text: whether an open model would do the work as well. It assumes identical token usage; a cheaper model may need more attempts or produce worse results, which erodes the saving. Treat it as a ceiling on token economics, not a promise — and prices change, so re-check OpenRouter.
verification.per_tier_token_counts_note: Panel discloses the formula and prices, not each tier's raw token ledger — disclosed limitation, not an overclaim
